record.field: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="Definitions_1" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn"> <bpmn:process id="simple_approval" name="Simple Approval Process" isExecutable="true"> <bpmn:startEvent id="start_event" name="Start"> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_start_to_review</bpmn:outgoing> </bpmn:startEvent> <bpmn:userTask id="review_task" name="Review Request"> <bpmn:incoming>flow_start_to_review</bpmn:incoming> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_review_to_decision</bpmn:outgoing> </bpmn:userTask> <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="decision_gateway" name="Approved?"> <bpmn:incoming>flow_review_to_decision</bpmn:incoming> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_approved</bpmn:outgoing> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_rejected</bpmn:outgoing> </bpmn:exclusiveGateway> <bpmn:userTask id="approve_task" name="Process Approval"> <bpmn:incoming>flow_approved</bpmn:incoming> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_approve_to_end</bpmn:outgoing> </bpmn:userTask> <bpmn:userTask id="reject_task" name="Process Rejection"> <bpmn:incoming>flow_rejected</bpmn:incoming> <bpmn:outgoing>flow_reject_to_end</bpmn:outgoing> </bpmn:userTask> <bpmn:endEvent id="end_event" name="End"> <bpmn:incoming>flow_approve_to_end</bpmn:incoming> <bpmn:incoming>flow_reject_to_end</bpmn:incoming> </bpmn:endEvent> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_start_to_review" sourceRef="start_event" targetRef="review_task" /> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_review_to_decision" sourceRef="review_task" targetRef="decision_gateway" /> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_approved" name="Approved" sourceRef="decision_gateway" targetRef="approve_task"> <bpmn:conditionExpression>approved == True</bpmn:conditionExpression> </bpmn:sequenceFlow> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_rejected" name="Rejected" sourceRef="decision_gateway" targetRef="reject_task"> <bpmn:conditionExpression>approved == False</bpmn:conditionExpression> </bpmn:sequenceFlow> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_approve_to_end" sourceRef="approve_task" targetRef="end_event" /> <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="flow_reject_to_end" sourceRef="reject_task" targetRef="end_event" /> </bpmn:process> </bpmn:definitions>
